metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
10 min AMRAP
12/10 cal row
10 2xDB Hang Power Clean (22.5/15kg)
12 V-ups
50m KB Farmer Carry (32/24)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Quads/glutes saturated by squat and carry; shoulders taxed by jerk. Target posterior chain and pulling muscles for balance.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 2 at 70 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 12/10 cal row, 10 2xDB Hang Power Clean (22.5/15kg), 12 V-ups, 50m KB Farmer Carry (32/24). For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
